prompt: Create a cute stylized 3D clay-rendered character on a clean white background: Baba Yaga as a squat elderly folklore witch wearing a large soft burnt orange-red hood or cap, long gray hair hanging down on both sides, and a simple brown robe with rounded toy-like folds. Her face is deliberately hidden by one flat opaque square censor block in a warm brown skin tone, centered over the head and covering all facial features. She holds exactly one crooked wooden walking staff in her left hand. Beside and partly attached to her right side is exactly one miniature log cabin hut, made from rounded golden-brown logs, with exactly one arched wooden door, exactly one small square upper window, exactly one dark blue-gray shingled roof, and exactly one squat chimney. The hut stands on exactly two birdlike chicken legs with three front claws visible on each foot, sculpted in the same warm wood-clay style. Use soft studio lighting, smooth rounded forms, tactile polymer-clay texture, subtle ambient shadows, high detail, centered composition, isometric front three-quarter view, whimsical fairy-tale toy aesthetic, no text, no border.
